# 💖 Support & Sponsorship (SadaPay)

If this repository has helped you or your students learn Python, consider supporting the project!

---

### 💳 Direct Transfer (Local & International Support)

You can support this project directly by initiating a bank transfer to my SadaPay account:

*   **Bank Name:** SadaPay (SadaTech Pakistan)
*   **IBAN:** `PK20SADA0000003311071868`

---

### 🇵🇰 Local Transfers (Within Pakistan)
You can instantly send PKR donations from any local bank or mobile wallet app (e.g., EasyPaisa, JazzCash, HBL, Alfalah, etc.):
1. Open your banking app and select **Transfer to Bank**.
2. Select **SadaPay** (or SadaTech) as the destination bank.
3. Paste the IBAN: `PK20SADA0000003311071868` (or use the mobile number associated with your account).
4. Enter the amount and complete the transfer!

---

### 🌍 International Transfers (Remittances from Abroad)
Because SadaPay accounts natively support global inbound wires, international sponsors can transfer funds directly from their local accounts (such as Wise, standard SWIFT/Wire systems) straight to this IBAN!
